summary: MongoDB exposes two documented HTTP APIs (Atlas Administration API and Atlas App Services Admin API), an Atlas CLI plus legacy `mongocli`, and an official MongoDB MCP server; authentication is required via Atlas service-account OAuth client credentials, legacy Atlas API key pairs, or an App Services bearer session token minted from Atlas API keys.

surfaces.name: MongoDB Atlas App Services Admin API

packages.runtimeHint: package name inferred from docs command; install docs linked from Atlas CLI documentation
